message:
feat(ring_buffer): add operational telemetry counters [ft-3kxe.22]

Wire up RingBufferTelemetry counters (pushes, overwrites, clears,
drains, items_drained) with initialization in new(), increments in
push()/clear()/drain(), and a telemetry() snapshot accessor.

Add 10 inline unit tests and 7 proptest invariant tests covering
counter accuracy, serde roundtrip, and algebraic identities
(pushes == overwrites + len).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
